query: SELECT id, heroHand, heroPosition, spotType, tagsJson, lesson, reviewed, effectiveStackBb, createdAt FROM hands ORDER BY createdAt;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3SoCqzRfnhrz7B5.fc077db4ca74 --database BFa4yaxy9c4cDn5az6aTTB --execute SELECT id, heroHand, heroPosition, spotType, tagsJson, lesson, reviewed, effectiveStackBb, createdAt FROM hands ORDER BY createdAt;

rows.lesson: Should have called flop c-bet with TPGK + backdoor flush draw. Solver calls 65% here.
Good aggressive line preflop and flop. Could have gotten more value on the river.

Opened pre with A8c, got called by three callers, flop is AK2 rainbow, I check oop, next to act bets 60% of pot, me and sb called. Turn Kd now two dimonds on board andwe have A8c. I ckeck, next to act bets big , 60% again, sb fold, i fold. Stack is 200 bb at the moment . Vilant passive fish which donks a lot
I 3bets 3.5x, utg called, flob is low hart cards, i x, he x, turn is h, i x he bets small i called. River blank i bets 20% of pot, he raised 5x i fold. Player is aggro.
Do not block-bet river without a plan versus raise.
Check-raise more often on wet boards.
